projects.title: Enterprise Java Microservices Stack
projects.description: Consolidated Multi-Tenant Cluster Architecture with Cold-Standby DR. Reduced infra costs by 65% while maintaining 99.9% availability.

projects.title: AWS Bedrock Agent Terraform Module
projects.description: Production-ready Terraform Module for deploying secure, scalable RAG architecture using AWS Bedrock Agents for GenAI Infrastructure as Code.

projects.title: AI-Powered Observability Automation
projects.description: Comprehensive observability platform for Kubernetes using Groundcover (eBPF), Prometheus, Grafana, and ClickHouse. Reduced MTTR by 60%.

projects.title: Three-Tier Web App on AWS EKS
projects.description: Microservices-based web app (React, Node.js, MongoDB) on AWS EKS with Blue/Green deployments for zero downtime.

projects.title: DevSecOps Pipeline Automation
projects.description: Comprehensive DevSecOps pipeline with automated SAST, DAST, SCA scanning, vulnerability management, and compliance reporting.

projects.title: Ad Bidding System with Traefik
projects.description: High-performance ad bidding system on AWS EKS with Traefik for secure HTTPS traffic routing from Google AdX with TLS termination.

testimonials.name: Paisley
testimonials.message: Exceptional DevOps expertise! Sanskar streamlined our CI/CD pipeline and reduced deployment time by 60%. His proactive approach to infrastructure optimization was invaluable.

testimonials.name: Ravi Raj Jha
testimonials.message: Outstanding SRE support! Sanskar's monitoring solutions and incident response workflows have significantly improved our system reliability.

testimonials.name: Oluwakush
testimonials.message: Sanskar delivered excellent SRE solutions with comprehensive observability and alerting systems. His expertise in kubernetes and cloud infrastructure is top-notch.

testimonials.name: Sean
testimonials.message: Professional and efficient DevOps support! Sanskar automated our entire deployment process and implemented robust security practices. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Prem
testimonials.message: Excellent work on Traefik setup and bidder application deployment! Sanskar's expertise in container orchestration and load balancing was exactly what we needed.

testimonials.name: Rohit Sahu
testimonials.message: Sanskar's expertise in React and Node.js transformed our web application. The performance improvements and clean code architecture exceeded our expectations.
